project_type: Full-stack SaaS platform - React 18 SPA + Hono API + Drizzle/PostgreSQL
test_framework: Vitest - configured but zero tests exist. Config at vitest.config.ts uses jsdom for frontend tests, includes src/**/*.{test,spec}.{ts,tsx}
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm run build to compile frontend. 2. Run npx tsc --noEmit to typecheck. 3. Run npx vitest run for any test files. 4. Verify no stack traces in error responses.
environment_constraints: No database available (Neon Postgres external). Tests must be unit tests with mocks or use Hono test client without real DB. No Docker daemon available.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Key convention: snake_case on wire, camelCase in code. Frontend api.ts runs toSnake() on all responses. Backend toCamel() on PATCH request bodies.
key_patterns: Routes: Hono sub-apps exported from server/routes/*.ts, mounted in server/index.ts. Auth: requireAuth middleware sets c.var.userId. Admin: requireAdmin middleware. DB: Drizzle ORM with typed schema at server/db/schema.ts. Migrations: numbered SQL files in server/db/migrations/. Utils: server/utils.ts has toCamel/toSnake helpers.
directory_structure: server/ - Hono backend (routes/, middleware/, db/, integrations/, lib/). src/ - React frontend (pages/, components/, lib/, hooks/). server/db/migrations/ - numbered SQL migrations. scripts/ - DB utility scripts.
